## Final Accepted Amendments

### `fr-2-db74ab47`

finding_summary: `tests/unit/br_adapter_test.rs:112-116,287-304` validates `br dep tree` with a test-only `DependencyTreeNode { dependencies: ... }` schema instead of the repo’s real public model in `src/adapters/br_models.rs:448-455` (`DepTreeNode`, which requires `title`, `status`, and `children`). Because this adapter test bypasses the actual type used by callers, it can pass even if real `DepTreeNode` deserialization is broken for `br dep tree` output. remediation_hint: switch the test to `ralph_burning::adapters::br_models::DepTreeNode` and feed it a realistic fixture matching the public contract.
